MA.name: microaneurysm
MA.visual: tiny, round, relatively well-defined red dot-like abnormalities
MA.exclude: normal vessel crossings, imaging noise, artifacts, and larger dot or blot hemorrhages
MA.positive_confounder: They are spatially separate from vessel crossings and are smaller and more sharply punctate than typical dot or blot hemorrhages.
MA.negative_confounder: Any visible dark-red structures are better explained by normal vessels, vessel crossings, larger hemorrhages, or image noise.

HE.name: retinal hemorrhage
HE.visual: dark-red dot, blot, flame-shaped, or irregular hemorrhagic abnormalities
HE.exclude: normal retinal vessels, vessel crossings, microaneurysms, pigmentation, and dark imaging artifacts
HE.positive_confounder: The findings are not explained by normal vessels, tiny isolated microaneurysms, pigmentation, or dark image artifacts.
HE.negative_confounder: Visible dark structures are better explained by normal vessels, vessel crossings, pigmentation, or image artifacts.

EX.name: hard exudate
EX.visual: bright yellow-white deposits with relatively sharp and well-defined borders
EX.exclude: the optic disc, imaging reflections, glare, soft exudates, and other bright artifacts
EX.positive_confounder: The sharp deposit-like findings are distinct from the optic disc, glare, reflections, and fluffy soft exudates.
EX.negative_confounder: Visible bright regions are better explained by the optic disc, glare, reflections, soft exudates, or other artifacts.

SE.name: soft exudate or cotton-wool spot
SE.visual: gray-white or pale fluffy lesions with soft, indistinct borders
SE.exclude: hard exudates, optic-disc margins, glare, overexposed regions, and other bright artifacts
SE.positive_confounder: The fluffy, indistinct findings are distinct from sharply bordered hard exudates, the optic disc, glare, and overexposure.
SE.negative_confounder: Visible bright regions are better explained by hard exudates, the optic disc, glare, overexposure, or other artifacts.

IRMA.name: intraretinal microvascular abnormality
IRMA.visual: irregular, dilated, or tortuous intraretinal vascular channels, often near ischemic retinal regions
IRMA.exclude: normal vessel branching, overlapping vessels, neovascularization, and vascular imaging artifacts
IRMA.positive_confounder: The abnormal intraretinal vascular channels are not explained by normal branching, overlapping vessels, or neovascularization.
IRMA.negative_confounder: Visible vascular patterns are better explained by normal branching, overlapping vessels, or vascular artifacts.

NV.name: neovascularization
NV.visual: an abnormal fine new-vessel network on the optic disc or elsewhere in the retina, often crossing normal vascular planes
NV.exclude: normal vessel branching, peripapillary vessels, intraretinal microvascular abnormalities, and vascular artifacts
NV.positive_confounder: The fine abnormal vessel network is not explained by normal branching, peripapillary vessels, IRMA, or vascular artifacts.
NV.negative_confounder: Visible vascular patterns are better explained by normal branching, peripapillary vessels, IRMA, or vascular artifacts.
